interface.shortDescription: ModernUO and Ultima Online development guidance for RebirthUO.
interface.longDescription: ModernUO provides focused Codex skills for RebirthUO server work, including migration guidance, cross-era change routing, named Ultima Online skill, spell, and item property parity checks, content parity checks, subsystem audits, serialization, timers, networking, regions, combat, crafting, loot, quests, housing, skills, stats, and related Ultima Online domain research.
defaultPrompt: Check this Ultima Online content parity.
Review this content change for cross-era parity impact.
Check Magery skill parity against ModernUO.
Check Flamestrike spell parity against ModernUO.
Check Spell Damage item property parity against ModernUO.
